changelog:
v2.0.3 (2026-03-22)

  • Fix: Preflight archive_noindex now handles both 'on' and '1' values for disable_author_archives and disable_date_archives (Rank Math uses inconsistent formats)

v2.0.2 (2026-03-22)

  • Fix: SQL endpoint no longer blocks UPDATE..SET queries

v2.0.1 (2026-03-21)

  • Fix: GSC proxy recognizes Search Console as active when Site Kit is connected
